title: Naval Air Warfare and Weapons
description: The Naval Air Warfare and Weapons Department of the Office of Naval Research supports the Navy’s air warfare and weapons needs, fostering the technology development of naval aviation platforms, kinetic weapons, directed energy and electric weapons.
text: ONR leverages the resources of academia, industry and the Navy to address Sea-Based Aviation by making it the fifth National Naval Responsibility (NNR). NNRs exist to highlight areas where the Navy and Marine Corps depend on robust, long-term research that may not be driven otherwise by commercial demand. The designation addresses science and technology (S&T) challenges associated with sea-based aircraft operations. Sea-based aviation NNR will help ensure ONR continues focusing on necessary S&T talent and resources to meet future aviation needs specific to the Navy and Marine Corps.
